---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to matching, install flow, documentation, or operations
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the improvement you want.

## Problem

What workflow is currently painful or missing?

## Proposed direction

Describe the smallest useful version of the change.

## Why this fits the project

Please explain how it supports one or more of these goals:

- local-first operation
- Linux and WSL friendliness
- low-token retrieval
- reusable issue patterns
- install or operational reliability

## Additional context

Links, examples, or sketches.
